name: inaedaa-blast
description: iNaedaa Blast — Smart WhatsApp Campaign Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c cyan,magenta "pnpm run dev -w apps/api" "pnpm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: pnpm run build -w apps/api && pnpm run build -w apps/web
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n API,WEB -c cyan,magenta "pnpm run start -w apps/api" "pnpm run start -w apps/web"
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint -w apps/api && pnpm run lint -w apps/web
